1944.name: Noble Spirit
1944.description: A noble spirit stirs within, and the Valkyrie grows ever mightier.
1944.input: Can be added to a Quick Slot
effects: All Damage Reduction +50 for 30 sec when using the skill
Casting Speed +10% for 30 sec when using the skill
HP Recovery +200 for 30 sec when using the skill
Only backward Death Line Chase available.
All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks
Consume no Stamina for 30 sec while sprinting.

1957.name: Purificatione III
1957.description: Release your sacred power to damage foes and cleanse yourself.
1957.input:
SHIFT + LMB 
Can be added to a Quick Slot
effects: Recover 700 HP per hit (Nullified during cooldown)
All Damage Reduction -20 for 10 sec on hits (Nullified during cooldown)
Spin the target on hits (PvE only)
Stun on hits (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)

1961.name: Castigatio IV
1961.description: Strike your lancia into the ground repeatedly to purge enemies.
1961.input:
↓ + LMB 
Hold ↓ + LMB to continue the skill

1966.name: Sacrum Ferit IV
1966.description: Counterattack with a shield and deeply stab the enemy using lancia.
1966.input:
RMB
← or → + RMB to perform lateral evasion
Perform from attack 2 after certain skills
Can be added to a Quick Slot
effects: Critical Hit Rate +80% for 5 sec when using the skill (Nullified during cooldown)
Forward Guard during the skill (Nullified during cooldown)
Stiffness on first hit (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)
Floating on last attack hits (PvE only) (Nullified during cooldown)
protection_lines: Forward Guard during the skill (Nullified during cooldown)

1967.name: Wave of Light
1967.description: Pull in all enemies by unleashing a wave of light before you, then deal holy damage on a designated point.
1967.input:
↓ + F
Can be added to a Quick Slot
effects: All Damage Reduction -20 for 10 sec on hits
Pull in the target on hits
Movement and Attack/Casting Speeds -50% for 1 sec on pull attack hits

1971.name: Verdict: Lancia Iustitiae IV
1971.description: Slam the lancia down onto the surface to cleanse all enemies in the vicinity.
1971.input:
SHIFT + RMB
Can be added to a Quick Slot
effects: All Damage Reduction +30 for 10 sec when using the skill
Movement Speed -15% for 5 sec on hits
Air Attack on last attack hits
Down Smash on last attack hits
25.8% last attack damage in PvP only

1974.name: Hastiludium III
1974.description: Valkyrie brazenly dashes forward with her lancia leading the way. The longer the dash, the faster her pace until no enemy formation can stand in her way.
1974.input:
↑ + F
Hold ↑ + F to dash continuously
LMB while dashing to perform stab attack
Can be added to a Quick Slot
effects: Knockdown on stab attack hits (PvE only)
Consumes 100 Stamina to continue the skill, then 150 Stamina to continue it once again.
The longer the dash, the greater the stab attack damage.

1977.name: Sanctitas de Enslar III
1977.description: Having absorbed Enslar's Sacred Power, Valkyrie instantly teleports in the desired direction and hurls the lancia to the ground to detonate in a holy explosion.
1977.input:
F
F after Celestial Spear
Hold LMB to aim
Can be added to a Quick Slot
effects: Melee AP +32 for 10 sec when using the skill
Knockdown on last attack hits (PvE only)
Moves to attack target, but performs standing attack if none targeted.

1978.name: Blitz Stab
1978.description: Perform blazingly-fast stabs with lancia's sacred power.
1978.input:
↑ + RMB
Can be added to a Quick Slot
Can be used with your longsword
effects: 50 bleeding damage every 3 sec for 9 sec on hits
All Evasion -12 for 10 sec on hits

1980.name: Death Line Chase
1980.description:
Auto-learn
The Valkyrie does not falter while courting death on the front lines chasing down her foe.
effects: Character collision occurs while moving forward
No character collision while moving backward
All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks
Activates Shield Chase after continuing backward Death Line Chase.

1981.name: Flow: Lucem Fluxum
1981.description:
Preceding Skill: [Sacrum Ferit I]
Leap and detonate your Sacred Power after Sacrum Ferit.
1981.input:
Hold RMB after Sacrum Ferit
Can be added to a Quick Slot
effects: All damage applies Sacrum Ferit's level damage x2

1982.name: Flow: Divina Vult
1982.description:
Preceding Skill: [Sanctitas de Enslar I]
Swing the lancia wide to send enemies flying.
1982.input:
LMB or F after Sanctitas de Enslar
LMB during Verdict: Lancia Iustitiae
effects: All Evasion -12 for 10 sec on hits

1983.name: Terra Sancta
1983.description: Raising her combat senses to the limits, the Valkyrie detonates and releases her Sacred Power towards all in front of her.
1983.input:
↓ + RMB
Hold LMB after Castigatio's last attack
LMB during Castigatio
Can be added to a Quick Slot

1984.name: Gladius Gloriae
1984.description:
Prerequisite: Use the [Secret Book] Abyssal Legacy ([The Magnus] Abyssal Revelation quest reward)
Channel your Sacred Power into your sword, then smite down all foes with divine blades.
1984.input:
F
F after certain skills
Can be added to a Quick Slot
Can be used with your lancia

Flurry of Kicks only available via a Quick Slot after learning this skill
effects: Super Armor before the attack hits
All Evasion -12 for 10 sec on hits
protection_lines: Super Armor before the attack hits

1985.name: Promptness
1985.description: The skilled Valkyrie is adept with switching between the sword and shield with the lancia, ready to attack at a moment's notice.
1985.input:
SPACE in certain situations
LMB after forward Death Line Chase
SPACE in certain situations with your longsword
Can only be used when Holy Lancia is not on cooldown with your longsword
effects: Floating on LMB hits after forward Death Line Chase (PvE only)
Super Armor during the skill (Nullified during cooldown)
protection_lines: Super Armor during the skill (Nullified during cooldown)

2748.name: Celestial Smite

Preceding Skill: [Celestial Spear IV]

SHIFT + X

Movement Speed -15% for 5 sec on hits
Pull in the target on hits (PvE only)

2815.name: Divine Slam
2815.description:

Preceding Skill: [Sword of Judgment IV]

SHIFT + Z

2816.name: Divine Descent

SHIFT + Z

3200.name: Absolute: Severing Light

Swing the sword to create a beam of light that slashes through darkness. Basic Valkyrie skill.

LMB + RMB

SHIFT + LMB

↓ + E with your lancia

4053.name: Divine Judgment of Light
4053.description:
Preceding Skill: [Judgment of Light III]
Preceding Skill: [Divine Power IV]

4211.name: Shield Chase IV

Direction + SHIFT

← + SHIFT or → + SHIFT with your lancia
On Guard after using the skill

6459.name: Divina Inpulsa

SHIFT + Q
SHIFT + Q after certain skills to perform from attack 2

718.name: Guard
718.description:
Auto-learn
You can block using your shield and move in all directions while staying on guard.
718.input:
Q
Q to cancel
Direction to move during the skill
SHIFT + ↑ during the skill to sprint in Succession
effects: Recover 25% of Max SP on blocks
All Damage Reduction +30 for 20 sec while on Guard
All CC Resistance (except Grapple), including from Back Attacks
Guard Gauge damage -30% on Forward Guard. (Applies 40% with your lancia.)
Consumes 250 Stamina per second while sprinting on Guard.
protection_lines: Guard Gauge damage -30% on Forward Guard. (Applies 40% with your lancia.)

731.name: Shining Dash
731.description:
Harnessing the Sacred Power of Elion, unleash a devastating dash attack.
Bathed in resplendent light, the Valkyrie, wielding the Sacred Power, dashes towards her foes up to three times in swift succession.

↑ + RMB
Hold LMB to perform extra attacks on hits
Can be used with your lancia
Can be added to a Quick Slot
effects: Forward Guard at the start of the skill and while moving
Push the target on attack 1 hits (PvE only)
protection_lines: Forward Guard at the start of the skill and while moving

746.name: Heaven's Echo III
746.description:

Draw the gaze of your foes, and receive the blessing of the heavens upon both yourself and your allies.

SHIFT + Q
